custom-sql.sql: SELECT COUNT(AssetDisplayPageEntry.assetDisplayPageEntryId) AS COUNT_VALUE FROM AssetDisplayPageEntry WHERE (AssetDisplayPageEntry.classNameId = ?) AND ( ( (AssetDisplayPageEntry.type_ = 1) AND (1 = ?) ) OR ( (AssetDisplayPageEntry.layoutPageTemplateEntryId = ?) AND (AssetDisplayPageEntry.type_ = 2) ) )

SELECT AssetDisplayPageEntry.* FROM AssetDisplayPageEntry WHERE (AssetDisplayPageEntry.classNameId = ?) AND ( ( (AssetDisplayPageEntry.type_ = 1) AND (1 = ?) ) OR ( (AssetDisplayPageEntry.layoutPageTemplateEntryId = ?) AND (AssetDisplayPageEntry.type_ = 2) ) )
